basic_details.job_title: IARI – Project Technical Support- I – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Technical Support- I. The Walk-in on 10-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per the guidelines of funding agency

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Food Technology/ Dairy Technology/ Dairy Chemistry/ Food Chemistry/ Food Science and Technology/ Food Science and Nutrition/ Biochemistry; and allied disciplines with one year experience in relevant subject.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 18000/- per month + 30% HRA (= Rs. 23400/- per month) for I & II year, with 5% increment on initial emoluments after every two years, subject to performance review.

seo_tags: IARI Project Technical Support- I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
